message:
feat(pages): Add pre-publish summary generation

New summary module providing comprehensive export preview before publishing:

- Quantitative metrics: conversation/message counts, estimated size
- Temporal scope: date range with activity histogram
- Content categorization: breakdown by workspace and agent
- Security status: encryption config, key slots, secret scan results
- Text rendering for terminal display with ANSI styling

The summary enables users to review exactly what will be published
and make informed decisions about their export scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
